entries.title: Completed Ed-Ready documentation cleanup and audit
entries.summary: Finalized the Ed-Ready documentation cleanup by refreshing project-level docs, app-specific docs, and the dated documentation inventory before merging the cleanup PR.
details: Refreshed the top-level docs and app-specific docs under lab_platform/docs.
Removed temporary cleanup/audit files after the pass was complete.
Squash-merged the documentation cleanup PR into main.
